version_notes: Adds full-bold user-action question guidance, structural managed-marker verification for repo-local shims, backup-first repair instructions for broken repo-local managed blocks, and explicit refresh handling for stale managed content.

project.name: AI Coding Agent Rules
project.summary: Generic execution-first AI coding agent rule templates plus the n8n-agent-rules operating contract and optional n8n adapter snippets.

skill.summary: Provides repo-local automatic AGENTS, CLAUDE, GEMINI, and Antigravity bootstrap templates and also publishes the n8n-agent-rules skill from the same project-owned rules source.

mcp.summary: No MCP surface is published for this standalone rules project.
